response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, which are mandatory requirements; their career is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks with no evidence of financial systems development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise beyond basic SQL.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ or Windows platform experience in last 10+ years
No domain experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
SQL experience listed but not contextualized with SQL Server or Oracle in finance systems

key_factors.factor: Absence of capital markets domain exposure
